rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 мчч. і 3 Октоїха, Сл., І нині: богородичний-догмат 2-го гласу. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. воскресний за гласом тропаря мчч. Відпуст великий з помин. цілого тижня і мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мчч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. воскресний за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизми чергові, сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон: якщо Господній або Богородичний храм, то – канон храму, мчч. та Октоїха. Якщо храм святого, то канон мчч., храмового святого та Октоїха. По 9-ій пісні – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: мчч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст великий з помин. усього тижня і мчч.
Часи: на 1-му – тропар і кондак дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – мчч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 2 Кор. 168 зач.; 1, 8-11. Єв. – Лк. 20 зач.; 5, 27-32.

troparion_en.text: Your holy martyrs Eulampius and Eulampia, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion_en.text: Let us honor the noble martyrs, / brother and sister in the flesh, wise Eulampius and Eulampia; / for they put to shame the devices of tyrants / through the power of the Crucified one. / Therefore, they have been declared the glory and boast of martyrs.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs Eulampius and Eulampia, at Nicomedia, and 200 Martyrs with them

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Eulampius and Eulampia, at Nicomedia, and 200 Martyrs with them

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs Eulampius and Eulampia, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text: Let us honor the noble martyrs, / brother and sister in the flesh, wise Eulampius and Eulampia; / for they put to shame the devices of tyrants / through the power of the Crucified one. / Therefore, they have been declared the glory and boast of martyrs.

oca_saints.name: Saint Amphilochius, Bishop of Vladimir, Volhynia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Amphilochius, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

Your holy martyr Theotecnus, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Theotecnus;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Bassian, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Saint Theophilus the Confessor of Bulgaria

troparion.text: Champion of Orthodoxy, teacher of purity and of true worship, / the enlightener of the universe and the adornment of hierarchs: / all-wise father Theophilus, your teachings have gleamed with light upon all things. / Intercede before Christ God to save our souls.

We come to you, as to a fountain of healing, O Father Ambrose.  / For you guide us truly on the path of salvation,  / protecting us from troubles and misfortunes by your prayers,  / and comforting us in our physical and spiritual sorrows;  / above all, you taught with humility, patience, and love.  / As our fervent intercessor, entreat Christ the Lover of mankind  / that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: Fulfilling the  precepts of the Shepherd of shepherds,  / you inherited the grace of Eldership, /  having compassion for all who come to you with faith; /  therefore we your children cry out to you with love: /  “Holy Father Ambrose, /  entreat Christ God that our souls may be saved.”

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr and Metropolitan of Moscow and Krutitsy, Peter Polyansky

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Peter, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

oca_saints.name: 26 Monastic Martyrs of Zographou Monastery on Mount Athos

troparion.text:
(Apolytikion)
Today, O honored Monastic Martyrs, and preachers of the Spirit,  / we celebrate your holy Feast as is meet, /  for you are a cause of blessings for us.  / Celebrating the All-night Vigil we sing: /  “O faithful servants of the Holy Trinity, entreat the Lord on our behalf.”

kontakion.text: Let us praise the intercessors and protectors of our Monastery (city),  / the sacred and Venerable Martyrs, twenty-six in number,  / who overthrew the Latin error, endured immolation and were crowned; /  therefore,we cry aloud: “Rejoice, O Venerable sufferers.”
